close_reason: Implemented starlark package with AST-based parser, object model with modification tracking, mutation API, and span-preserving writer. All 9 tests pass.
description:
# Starlark Object Model

Create a proper rules.star parser and object model using `go.starlark.net/syntax`.

## Location
```
src/go/pkg/starlark/
├── model.go       # RulesFile, Target, Attribute types
├── parser.go      # Parse rules.star → object model
├── writer.go      # Object model → rules.star (preserving unchanged)
├── mutator.go     # Mutation API
└── *_test.go      # Tests
```

## Tasks

- [ ] Design data model types (RulesFile, Target, Attribute, etc.)
- [ ] Implement parser using `go.starlark.net/syntax`
- [ ] Implement span-preserving writer (unchanged → original text)
- [ ] Implement mutation API (SetDeps, AddDep, RemoveDep, SetAttribute)
- [ ] Add target creation/deletion support
- [ ] Unit tests for round-tripping (parse → serialize = identical)
- [ ] Unit tests for mutation (parse → mutate → serialize = correct diff)

## Key Design Points

- Parse to AST, wrap in types that track modification state
- Serialize back preserving original spans for unchanged nodes
- Track modification at attribute level, not just target level
title: Phase 1: Starlark Object Model
